subcodes.first_line: Say: O God, my God! All praise be unto Thee for having guided me unto the ocean of Thy knowledge, the Dawning-Place of Thy Cause and the Dayspring of Thy signs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل اللهم یا الهی لک الحمد بما هدیتنی الی بحر عرفانک و مشرق امرک و مطلع آیاتک
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for nearness to God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
